scope: M4 scenario-chain readback basics. Draft phrase-level scenario turns only, using existing Captain Ether branches. Keep station identity, reporting point, crossing side, time, channel, urgency/distress signal, and readback/correction boundaries exact. Do not introduce a new runtime item type.

items.source_text: Марина Альфа, парусная яхта Аврора подходит с юга.
items.target_text: Marina Alpha, sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south.
accepted_answers: Marina Alpha, sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south.
Marina Alpha sailing yacht Aurora approaching from the south

should_accept: Marina Alpha, sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south.
Marina Alpha sailing yacht Aurora approaching from the south
should_reject: Marina Bravo sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south
Marina Alpha sailing yacht Aurora departing to south
Port Control sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Marina Alpha / Bravo / Port Control; approaching / departing; south / north
qa_notes.linguist_note: Station identity, approach status, and direction must remain exact in the first scenario turn.

items.source_text: Запрашиваем гостевое место для одной ночи.
items.target_text: Request visitor berth for one night.
accepted_answers: Request visitor berth for one night.
Requesting visitor berth for one night

should_accept: Request visitor berth for one night.
Requesting visitor berth for one night
should_reject: Request fuel berth for one night
Request visitor berth for two nights
Cancel visitor berth for one night
dangerous_minimal_pairs: visitor berth / fuel berth; one night / two nights; request / cancel
qa_notes.linguist_note: The requested berth type, duration, and request/cancel status must not drift.

items.source_text: Следуйте к месту Браво два, правым бортом к причалу.
items.target_text: Proceed to berth Bravo two, starboard side to.
accepted_answers: Proceed to berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

should_accept: Proceed to berth Bravo two, starboard side to.
Proceed to berth Bravo two starboard side to
should_reject: Proceed to berth Bravo three starboard side to
Proceed to berth Bravo two port side to
Wait outside berth Bravo two starboard side to
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Bravo two / Bravo three; starboard / port; proceed / wait
qa_notes.linguist_note: Berth number, vessel side, and proceed/wait instruction are docking-critical.

items.source_text: Повторяю: место Браво два, правым бортом к причалу.
items.target_text: Read back berth Bravo two, starboard side to.
accepted_answers: Read back berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

should_accept: Read back berth Bravo two, starboard side to.
Read back berth Bravo two starboard side to
should_reject: Read back berth Bravo two port side to
Read back berth Bravo three starboard side to
Correction berth Bravo two starboard side to
dangerous_minimal_pairs: read back / correction; Bravo two / Bravo three; starboard / port
qa_notes.linguist_note: This readback must not become a correction and must preserve side and berth number.

items.source_text: Аврора стоит у места Браво два.
items.target_text: Aurora alongside berth Bravo two.
accepted_answers: Aurora alongside berth Bravo two.
Aurora is alongside berth Bravo two

should_accept: Aurora alongside berth Bravo two.
Aurora is alongside berth Bravo two
should_reject: Aurora approaching berth Bravo two
Aurora alongside berth Bravo three
Aurora departed berth Bravo two
dangerous_minimal_pairs: alongside / approaching / departed; Bravo two / Bravo three
qa_notes.linguist_note: Alongside status is distinct from approach/departure and must keep berth number.

items.source_text: Судно пересекает по правому носу.
items.target_text: Crossing vessel on starboard bow.
accepted_answers: Crossing vessel on starboard bow.

should_accept: Crossing vessel on starboard bow.
should_reject: Crossing vessel on port bow
Overtaking vessel on starboard bow
Crossing vessel on starboard quarter
dangerous_minimal_pairs: crossing / overtaking; starboard / port; bow / quarter
qa_notes.linguist_note: Traffic type and relative bearing must remain exact.

items.source_text: Запросите намерения пересекающего судна.
items.target_text: Request crossing vessel intentions.
accepted_answers: Request crossing vessel intentions.
Request intentions of crossing vessel

should_accept: Request crossing vessel intentions.
Request intentions of crossing vessel
should_reject: Report crossing vessel intentions
Request overtaking vessel intentions
Request crossing vessel position
dangerous_minimal_pairs: request / report; crossing / overtaking; intentions / position
qa_notes.linguist_note: Clarification request must not become a report or a position query.

items.source_text: Изменяю курс вправо, чтобы пройти за кормой.
items.target_text: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.
accepted_answers: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.
Alter course to starboard to pass astern

should_accept: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.
Alter course to starboard to pass astern
should_reject: Altering course to port to pass astern
Altering course to starboard to pass ahead
Maintaining course to starboard to pass astern
dangerous_minimal_pairs: alter / maintain; starboard / port; astern / ahead
qa_notes.linguist_note: Course action, side, and passing relation are collision-risk boundaries.

items.source_text: Подтверждаю, свободно проходим за кормой.
items.target_text: Confirm clear, passing astern.
accepted_answers: Confirm clear, passing astern.

should_accept: Confirm clear, passing astern.
Confirm clear passing astern
should_reject: Confirm clear passing ahead
Confirm not clear passing astern
Cancel clear passing astern
dangerous_minimal_pairs: clear / not clear / cancel; astern / ahead
qa_notes.linguist_note: Clear status and passing relation must stay exact.

items.source_text: Сообщаю прохождение точки Дельта.
items.target_text: Report passing point Delta.
accepted_answers: Report passing point Delta.
Reporting passing point Delta

should_accept: Report passing point Delta.
Reporting passing point Delta
should_reject: Report passing point Echo
Request passing point Delta
Report leaving point Delta
dangerous_minimal_pairs: report / request; passing / leaving; Delta / Echo
qa_notes.linguist_note: Reporting verb, waypoint, and movement status must remain exact.

items.source_text: ВТС: перейдите на канал один два.
items.target_text: VTS instructs, switch to channel one two.
accepted_answers: VTS instructs, switch to channel one two.

should_accept: VTS instructs, switch to channel one two.
VTS instructs switch to channel one two
should_reject: VTS advises switch to channel one two
VTS instructs switch to channel one six
Marina instructs switch to channel one two
dangerous_minimal_pairs: VTS / Marina; instructs / advises; channel 12 / 16
qa_notes.linguist_note: Authority, instruction/advice class, and channel must remain exact.

items.source_text: Повторяю: перейти на канал один два.
items.target_text: Read back, switch to channel one two.
accepted_answers: Read back, switch to channel one two.

should_accept: Read back, switch to channel one two.
Read back switch to channel one two
should_reject: Read back switch to channel one six
Correction switch to channel one two
Read back stand by on channel one two
dangerous_minimal_pairs: read back / correction; switch / stand by; channel 12 / 16
qa_notes.linguist_note: Readback type and channel action must remain exact.

items.source_text: Туманная полоса впереди, уменьшаем скорость.
items.target_text: Fog bank ahead, reducing speed.
accepted_answers: Fog bank ahead, reducing speed.

should_accept: Fog bank ahead, reducing speed.
Fog bank ahead reducing speed
should_reject: Fog bank astern reducing speed
Fog bank ahead increasing speed
Smoke bank ahead reducing speed
dangerous_minimal_pairs: fog / smoke; ahead / astern; reduce / increase speed
qa_notes.linguist_note: Visibility hazard, relative direction, and action must remain exact.

items.source_text: Подавайте звуковой сигнал каждые две минуты.
items.target_text: Sound signal every two minutes.
accepted_answers: Sound signal every two minutes.

should_accept: Sound signal every two minutes.
should_reject: Sound signal every one minute
No sound signal every two minutes
Light signal every two minutes
dangerous_minimal_pairs: sound / light; two minutes / one minute; required / no signal
qa_notes.linguist_note: Signal type and interval are safety-critical.

items.source_text: Секьюрите, видимость менее одной мили в районе Чарли.
items.target_text: Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.
accepted_answers: Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.
Sécurité visibility less than one mile in area Charlie

should_accept: Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.
Sécurité visibility less than one mile in area Charlie
should_reject: Pan Pan visibility less than one mile in area Charlie
Securite visibility more than one mile in area Charlie
Securite visibility less than one mile in area Alpha
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Securite / Pan-Pan; less / more than one mile; Charlie / Alpha
qa_notes.linguist_note: Safety signal, visibility threshold, and area must remain exact.

items.source_text: Пан-Пан, двигатель отказал, позиция у буя семь.
items.target_text: Pan-Pan, engine failed, position near buoy seven.
accepted_answers: Pan-Pan, engine failed, position near buoy seven.

should_accept: Pan-Pan, engine failed, position near buoy seven.
Pan Pan engine failed position near buoy seven
should_reject: Mayday engine failed position near buoy seven
Pan Pan steering failed position near buoy seven
Pan Pan engine failed position near buoy eight
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Pan-Pan / Mayday; engine / steering; buoy seven / eight
qa_notes.linguist_note: Urgency signal, failure type, and position reference must remain exact.

items.source_text: Запрашиваем буксировку в гавань.
items.target_text: Request tow to harbour.
accepted_answers: Request tow to harbour.
Request towing to harbour

should_accept: Request tow to harbour.
Request towing to harbour
should_reject: Request pilot to harbour
Cancel tow to harbour
Request tow to marina berth
dangerous_minimal_pairs: tow / pilot; request / cancel; harbour / marina berth
qa_notes.linguist_note: Assistance type, request/cancel status, and destination must remain exact.

items.source_text: Рулевое управление ограничено, держимся правее фарватера.
items.target_text: Steering limited, keeping starboard side of fairway.
accepted_answers: Steering limited, keeping starboard side of fairway.
Steering is limited keeping starboard side of fairway

should_accept: Steering limited, keeping starboard side of fairway.
Steering is limited keeping starboard side of fairway
should_reject: Steering failed keeping starboard side of fairway
Steering limited keeping port side of fairway
Engine limited keeping starboard side of fairway
dangerous_minimal_pairs: steering / engine; limited / failed; starboard / port
qa_notes.linguist_note: Equipment, severity, and fairway side must remain exact.

items.source_text: Повторяю: Пан-Пан, запрос буксировки в гавань.
items.target_text: Read back Pan-Pan, request tow to harbour.
accepted_answers: Read back Pan-Pan, request tow to harbour.

should_accept: Read back Pan-Pan, request tow to harbour.
Read back Pan Pan request tow to harbour
should_reject: Read back Mayday request tow to harbour
Read back Pan Pan cancel tow to harbour
Correction Pan Pan request tow to harbour
dangerous_minimal_pairs: read back / correction; Pan-Pan / Mayday; request / cancel tow
qa_notes.linguist_note: Readback, urgency signal, and assistance request status must remain exact.

items.source_text: Мэйдэй, принимаем воду, позиция пять миль к востоку от Альфа.
items.target_text: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.
accepted_answers: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.

should_accept: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.
Mayday taking water position five miles east of Alpha
should_reject: Pan Pan taking water position five miles east of Alpha
Mayday fire position five miles east of Alpha
Mayday taking water position five miles west of Alpha
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Mayday / Pan-Pan; taking water / fire; east / west
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distress signal, nature of distress, distance, and relative direction must remain exact.

items.source_text: На борту четыре человека.
items.target_text: Four persons on board.
accepted_answers: Four persons on board.
Four people on board

should_accept: Four persons on board.
Four people on board
should_reject: Five persons on board
Four persons overboard
Four persons abandoning ship
dangerous_minimal_pairs: four / five; on board / overboard / abandoning ship
qa_notes.linguist_note: Person count and status must remain exact.

items.source_text: Требуется аварийный насос.
items.target_text: Require emergency pump.
accepted_answers: Require emergency pump.
Need emergency pump

should_accept: Require emergency pump.
Need emergency pump
should_reject: Require bilge status
Require emergency tow
Cancel emergency pump
dangerous_minimal_pairs: pump / tow / bilge status; require / cancel
qa_notes.linguist_note: Assistance/equipment requested must remain exact.

items.source_text: Спасательное судно повторяет: пять миль к востоку от Альфа.
items.target_text: Rescue unit reads back five miles east of Alpha.
accepted_answers: Rescue unit reads back five miles east of Alpha.
Rescue unit read back five miles east of Alpha

should_accept: Rescue unit reads back five miles east of Alpha.
Rescue unit read back five miles east of Alpha
should_reject: Rescue unit reads back five miles west of Alpha
Rescue unit corrects five miles east of Alpha
Marina reads back five miles east of Alpha
dangerous_minimal_pairs: rescue unit / marina; read back / correct; east / west
qa_notes.linguist_note: Responding station, readback/correction status, and position must remain exact.

items.source_text: Позиция получена
items.target_text: position received
accepted_answers: position received
position is received

should_accept: position received
position is received
should_reject: position corrected
position unknown
message received
dangerous_minimal_pairs: position / message; received / corrected / unknown
qa_notes.linguist_note: Acknowledging position is distinct from correcting or not knowing it.

items.source_text: Исправление: район Чарли
items.target_text: correction area Charlie
accepted_answers: correction area Charlie

should_accept: correction area Charlie
should_reject: read back area Charlie
correction area Alpha
correction channel Charlie
dangerous_minimal_pairs: correction / readback; area Charlie / Alpha; area / channel
qa_notes.linguist_note: Correction marker and area name must remain exact.

grammar_patterns.pattern: station call with vessel identity and approach direction
examples: Marina Alpha, sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south.

grammar_patterns.pattern: request a visitor berth for a duration
examples: Request visitor berth for one night.

grammar_patterns.pattern: proceed to named berth with side-to instruction
examples: Proceed to berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

grammar_patterns.pattern: read back named berth and side-to instruction
examples: Read back berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

grammar_patterns.pattern: traffic crossing description with relative position
examples: Crossing vessel on starboard bow.

grammar_patterns.pattern: alter course to side to pass ahead or astern
examples: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.
VTS instructs, switch to channel one two.
Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Pan-Pan equipment failure with position reference
examples: Pan-Pan, engine failed, position near buoy seven.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Mayday nature of distress with relative position
examples: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.

grammar_patterns.pattern: rescue unit readback of distress position
examples: Rescue unit reads back five miles east of Alpha.
Sound signal every two minutes.
Aurora alongside berth Bravo two.
Request crossing vessel intentions.

grammar_patterns.pattern: confirm clear status and passing relation
examples: Confirm clear, passing astern.
Report passing point Delta.
Read back, switch to channel one two.
Fog bank ahead, reducing speed.
Request tow to harbour.
Steering limited, keeping starboard side of fairway.

grammar_patterns.pattern: read back signal and assistance request
examples: Read back Pan-Pan, request tow to harbour.
Four persons on board.
Require emergency pump.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: marina arrival readback: station, berth number, side-to, approach/alongside status

phrase_scenario_marina_arrival_from_sout: Marina Alpha, sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south.
phrase_scenario_mooring_berth_bravo_two_: Proceed to berth Bravo two, starboard side to.
phrase_scenario_readback_berth_bravo_two: Read back berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

phrase_scenario_marina_arrival_from_sout: Port Control sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south
phrase_scenario_mooring_berth_bravo_two_: Proceed to berth Bravo two port side to
phrase_scenario_readback_berth_bravo_two: Correction berth Bravo two starboard side to

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Scenario-linked marina turns must preserve station, berth, side-to, and vessel status.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: traffic crossing: crossing/overtaking, starboard/port, alter/maintain, astern/ahead

phrase_scenario_alter_course_starboard_0: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.
Altering course to starboard to pass ahead

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Collision-avoidance turns must preserve traffic type, side, action, and passing relation.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: VTS reporting chain: report/request, point Delta/Echo, instruction/advice, channel 12/16

phrase_scenario_vts_instruction_channel_: VTS instructs, switch to channel one two.
phrase_scenario_readback_channel_one_two: Read back, switch to channel one two.

phrase_scenario_vts_instruction_channel_: VTS advises switch to channel one two
phrase_scenario_readback_channel_one_two: Read back switch to channel one six

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Authority and channel-change chains must preserve report/instruction/readback semantics.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: restricted visibility: fog/smoke, reduce/increase speed, sound interval, Securite/Pan-Pan

phrase_scenario_securite_visibility_less: Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.
Pan Pan visibility less than one mile in area Charlie

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Safety-warning scenario turns must preserve signal, threshold, area, and action.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: Pan-Pan equipment chain: Pan-Pan/Mayday, engine/steering, tow/pilot, request/cancel

phrase_scenario_panpan_engine_failed_pos: Pan-Pan, engine failed, position near buoy seven.
phrase_scenario_panpan_steering_limited_: Steering limited, keeping starboard side of fairway.
phrase_scenario_readback_panpan_tow_requ: Read back Pan-Pan, request tow to harbour.

phrase_scenario_panpan_engine_failed_pos: Mayday engine failed position near buoy seven
phrase_scenario_panpan_steering_limited_: Steering limited keeping port side of fairway
phrase_scenario_readback_panpan_tow_requ: Read back Pan Pan cancel tow to harbour

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Urgency chains must not drift into distress, wrong equipment, or cancelled assistance.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: Mayday position chain: Mayday/Pan-Pan, taking water/fire, east/west, persons count/status

phrase_scenario_mayday_taking_water_posi: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.
phrase_scenario_rescue_unit_readback_pos: Rescue unit reads back five miles east of Alpha.

phrase_scenario_mayday_taking_water_posi: Pan Pan taking water position five miles east of Alpha
phrase_scenario_rescue_unit_readback_pos: Rescue unit reads back five miles west of Alpha

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Distress chain must preserve signal, distress nature, position, persons status, and requested equipment.

producer_notes.intent: Add scenario-chain turns as normal matcher-safe items without changing runtime item types.
producer_notes.next_gate: Sea Speak Linguist risk review before engineering gate, merge, QA, or production deploy.
